title: Resonance '26
description: 2 Rounds. 4 Domains. 1 Epic Tech Showdown. IEEE CIS VIT Pune presents Resonance '26, where cutting-edge ideas meet live innovation battles — submit, pitch, and win big!
domains: AI & ML – Build the future with intelligent systems
Cyber Security – Hack the challenge, defend the world
IoT & Robotics – Engineer the machines of tomorrow
Student Innovation – Your wildest ideas, centre stage
rounds: Round 1 – Online PPT submission through the platform
Round 2 – Top selected teams present LIVE before judges on 17th April

title: Kaggle Grandmaster Webinar
description: Introduction to real world application on LLMs across industries.

title: GPU Webinar
description: Introduction to GPU optimization techniques and parallel computing concepts. Enhanced awareness of career opportunities in GPU computing and cybersecurity.

title: IEEE CIS Inaugration
description: Offical establishment of IEEE CIS Student Chapter at VIT Pune

title: MCP Webinar
description: Detailed explanation of context-aware AI system architecture
